required_preferences.fact: Starts workdays with a cross-team leadership briefing that includes both European and North American staff, replacing the exclusive European huddle

supersedes.fact: Begins workdays with a team huddle call to align European support priorities — never skips this ritual during rotation

required_preferences.fact: Delegates complex troubleshooting cases to senior staff members — focuses on managerial oversight and coordination rather than hands-on technical resolution

supersedes.fact: Prefers to handle complex troubleshooting cases solo, delegating only simple tickets to others

required_preferences.fact: Starts each morning by reviewing his calendar and setting three top priorities — never begins work without a plan
Attends weekly physiotherapy sessions for wrist recovery and follows prescribed home exercises daily; prioritizes rehabilitation over all other physical activity
Initiates video calls with his daughter every Sunday evening to share updates and play a short collaborative online activity, to maintain consistent contact between school holidays
Shifts Friday night entertainment from solitary French films at home to hosting group movie nights featuring classic French cinema for visiting family during the wedding festivities

persona: A bilingual helpdesk specialist assisting clients in both French and English
